mapper.sql:
SELECT ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, DIRECTION, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION where WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}
DIRECTION = #{direction}
mapper.select:
SELECT MASS_ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION where WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}
AND DIRECTION = #{direction}

SELECT ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, DIRECTION, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION( ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, DIRECTION, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{direction, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storehouseName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{massId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{massName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION SET DIRECTION = #{direction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STOREHOUSE_ID = #{storehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, STOREHOUSE_NAME = #{storehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REGION_ID = #{regionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REGION_NAME = #{regionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MASS_ID = #{massId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MASS_NAME = #{massName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID IN
#{item}
